top_signals.title: Oil Creeps Lower as Traders Weigh Trump’s Threats to Strike Iran
top_signals.summary: Oil edged lower in choppy trading as investors weighed President Donald Trump’s newest threat to resume strikes on Iran, a pledge the US leader has made repeatedly before backing off since a truce was agreed to in early April.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Sweden picks France’s FDI frigates in potential $4.2 billion deal
top_signals.summary: Sweden picked the French vessel due to a combination of quick delivery time, an active production line and proven air-defense capabilities, officials said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
